strategy: He takes +35% from Fire and Myth and resists Ice 80%. Hit with Fire or Myth. He is stunnable.
Expect an interrupt Dr. Von's Monster on Round 1; shield or heal up before it lands.
Avoid normal heals: a healing spell makes him Link the healed target (a DoT). Use pet heals instead, which do NOT trigger the Link.
Blade up, stun if handy, and hit with Fire or Myth.
cheatNotes: He interrupts with Dr. Von's Monster on Round 1. Pre-shield or be ready to heal it off.
A healing spell makes him Link the healed wizard (a DoT). Heal with your pet instead, which does not trigger it.
Pet heals are safe; they never trigger the Link.
